fail_with_caveat_passC_notes.351: DOHRA-DECODE primary FAIL 7 hits vs verifier PASS 0 hits — verifier scored PASTA as inverted (independence vs DOHRA redundancy). Per R279 precedent, primary FAIL stands as FAIL_with_caveat_PassC_borderline. Flagged for human review.

disagreement_count_verdict_level: 1/25 (R351 primary FAIL vs verifier PASS — Pattern C borderline)

R279_steel_pan_PTCH_within_head_harmonic.note: 5 fresh queries from different angles. No single paper reaches 0.7; no 3-5 paper L7 combination covers integer-ratio constraint without invoking music metaphor. Reaffirms PASS-with-caveat UNCERTAIN. Flagged for music-DSP × ML crossover venue search outside indexed search.

R302_brood_X_prime_coprime_replay_schedu.note: 5 fresh queries + 1 bonus Cicada Principle check. NEW finding: Cicada Principle exists as published CSS visual-design technique (prime-coprime tile widths + animation durations) but NOT in ML training. 3-paper composition saturates ~0.65-0.70; integration into CL replay is novel. Promoted to borderline-L7 with new pattern note: number-theoretic kernels require non-ML adjacency probes (CSS, signal-processing, synthesizer DSP).

combined_with_prior_epochs.substantive_pass_count_with_caveat: 1 (R279 UNCERTAIN) + 1 (R302 UNCERTAIN borderline-L7); both retained for human review
combined_with_prior_epochs.p_value_vs_1pct_novelty_rate_no_pass: 0.0089 — below α=0.01 threshold; rejects 1% novelty hypothesis at α=0.01 (deeper than epoch 14's 0.0113 at N=446)
